title: Communauté de communes du Canton de Nouvion
summary: The Communauté de communes du Canton de Nouvion is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1996. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ponthieu-Marquenterre in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes du Canton de Nouvion is a former communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. It was created in December 1996. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ponthieu-Marquenterre in January 2017.

Composition
This Communauté de communes included 17 communes:
